data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Temporary equipment loan during repair', which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, the evidence does not provide any concrete details or confirmation that such a loan was offered or arranged during the repair process. The absence of this information indicates a clear gap in fulfilling the requirement, as the evidence only discusses the booking and diagnostic aspects without addressing the temporary equipment loan directly.
gaps: No evidence of a temporary equipment loan being offered or arranged during the repair.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
